Source metadata.extraction_context: As part of the master plan, we have introduced a robust set of initiatives for leadership capability development. To drive leadership effectiveness, we have embedded the six transformational leadership tenets - growth mindset, psychological safety, feedback culture, courageous conversations, collaboration and decision making - into our leadership culture through our flagship managerial training, Building Great Managers.

consolidated_stakeholders.Role: Convened GFIT to improve disclosures and enhance environmental risk management practices.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS was the co-chair in the disclosure workstream of the MAS-convened GFIT. The taskforce comprises representatives from financial institutions, corporates, non-governmental organisations, and financial industry associations which aims to (i) develop a taxonomy; (ii) improve disclosures; ili) foster green finance solutions; and (iv) enhance environmental risk management practices of financial institutions.

consolidated_stakeholders.Role: Responsible for developing a sustainability reporting roadmap for Singapore-incorporated companies.

Source metadata.extraction_context: DBS is a member of the SRAC, which was jointly set up by Singapore's Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA) and the Singapore Exchange Regulation (SGX RegCo). The committee is responsible for developing a sustainability reporting roadmap for Singapore-incorporated companies, including the adoption of the International Financial Reporting Standards’ (IFRS) sustainability standards.
